title: La guerra de los pasteles
writer: Celestino Gorostiza, Emilio Gómez Muriel, Rafael Solana
actors: Mapy Cortés, Domingo Soler, Pedro Armendáriz
plot: In 19th-century Tacubaya, the daughter (Mapy Cortés) of a French pastry maker is to marry the mayor of the town (Domingo Soler), but her heart is said to be inclined more to an officer (Pedro Armendáriz). The sentimental conflict ...
